Start with: “My eyesight has been getting worse really slowly, especially reading or driving at night.” If the clinician asks open-ended follow-ups, volunteer: gradual worsening over months, bumping into things on the sides, pressure-like headaches behind the eyes a few times a week, and feeling unusually tired.
